warehouseQuery.query: Select A.* From gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_all_users_archive A Where trunc(A.period) = (Select Max(t_period) From (Select Distinct trunc(gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_all_users_archive.period) As t_period From gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_all_users_archive))

Select A.* From gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_users_rwt_archive A Where trunc(A.period) = (Select Max(t_period) From (Select Distinct trunc(gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_users_rwt_archive.period) As t_period From gpdip_uddl_hcdb.hc_users_rwt_archive))
